title: Sleigh Bells
content:
In fury, come the Heavens,
    the days, our horsebells
    upon a crystal sleigh.
    Up slowly until,
    the horse carriage wet
    and coming up the evening
    walk pauses; then snow
    before a vanished world.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Sleigh Bells", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
